final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing infographic for a Sony A7 camera teardown, detailing all components with their names.

Style/medium: technical infographic illustration, exploded-view diagram style, clean vector lines with subtle 3D shading, reminiscent of iFixit teardown guides
Composition: centered exploded-view layout, parts fanning outward from center, numbered callout lines connecting each component to labels, isometric perspective
Subject: Sony A7 camera disassembled into key components — sensor assembly, IBIS unit, shutter mechanism, LCD screen, EVF, battery compartment, main circuit board, grip, lens mount, hot shoe, dials and buttons
Scene/backdrop: neutral gradient background (light gray to white), minimal distraction, focus on technical clarity
Color palette: Sony corporate colors (black, silver, orange accent for highlights), white labels with black text, blue callout lines
Materials/textures: metallic finish on body parts, matte plastic on grip and dials, glass texture on LCD and EVF, circuit board traces visible on PCB
Text (verbatim): "Sony" "A7"
Constraints: must clearly label at least 12 distinct components; text must be readable at 1024px width; exploded arrangement must show spatial relationship between parts
Avoid: copyrighted Sony logos or trademarks beyond the verbatim text; cluttered overlapping labels; photorealistic style that obscures technical detail; decorative flourishes; 8K stuffer language
